compatibilityBoundary: Existing API/SSE contracts, ReActExecutorPort, StreamCallback, tool approval behavior, AgentScope configuration keys, and engine=kernel rollback behavior remain compatible.
affectedLayers: Kernel chat inbound command and external invocation entry point
Focused tests and release gate evidence
owners: Seahorse Kernel owns tenant, run profile, model routing, tool governance, approval, quota, audit, memory, snapshots, and external invocation preparation.
AgentScope Core owns AgentScope ReAct execution, client invocation, event mapping, cancellation, and protocol conversion.
Optional AgentScope integrations own A2A, Nacos/config-center, Studio, and observation export surfaces.
invariants: AgentScope is not a second product control plane.
AgentScope tool calls cannot bypass Seahorse governed tool execution.
A2A does not construct final AgentLoopRequest directly.
Physical Maven module split remains a future M4 packaging migration.
